headline: Meta's strategic acquisition of a robotics startup marks a significant push into humanoid AI development.

sections.title: News
items: Meta enhances its humanoid AI capabilities by acquiring a robotics startup, signaling a major push into Edge AI and robotics.
Pentagon collaborates with Nvidia, Microsoft, and AWS to integrate AI into classified networks, a strategic move in national security tech.
Anthropic's potential $900B+ valuation round suggests massive investor confidence in AI's growth potential.

sections.title: Research
items: OmniRobotHome introduces a multi-camera platform for real-time, multi-person, human-robot interaction, paving the way for enhanced robotic interface capabilities.
FlexiTac offers an open-source tactile sensing solution, promising low-cost scalability for robotic systems in various applications.
LaST-R1 paper proposes novel adaptive physical latent reasoning models, advancing VLA model reinforcement.

sections.title: Jobs
items: Anthropic seeks a French-speaking Account Executive for Beneficial Deployments in London, UK, focusing on ethical AI uses.
Mistral is hiring an Account Executive, AI for Citizens in Paris, aiming to expand AI solutions for public sector applications.
Account Executive opportunities at Mistral in NY and SF Bay Area for Enterprise solutions, emphasizing AI's pivotal role in digital transformation.

action_item: Explore the OmniRobotHome research paper for innovative human-robot interaction insights applicable to your projects in SignalForge.
